overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting a first-person view from a vessel's bridge navigating through stormy seas at night. The scene features functional navigation displays including radar and chart plotters, with the ship's bow cutting through rough waters as lightning strikes nearby.

agents.ego_description: navigating the ship through rough seas using the bridge instrumentation

entered.detail: navigation chart display showing coastal map with vessel position
rotating radar screen with sweeping arm showing surrounding contacts
depth sounder display showing water depth measurements
bow of the ship with anchor equipment and navigation lights
rough stormy sea surface with visible wave action
metal safety railing on the port side of the bridge wing
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the bridge wing

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a stable first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through rough seas at night. The three navigation displays are active, showing chart data, rotating radar, and depth information. The ship's bow is visible cutting through dark, choppy waters while the vessel maintains steady forward momentum.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station during lightning storm

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the ocean surface on the port side

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate through intensifying storm conditions

entered.detail: bright electrical discharge illuminating the storm clouds and water surface

segments.scene_description: A brief segment capturing a lightning strike on the port side of the vessel. The flash temporarily brightens the scene, revealing more detail of the rough sea state and storm clouds. The navigation displays continue operating normally as the ship maintains course through the severe weather.

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the storm with reduced visibility after the lightning flash

segments.scene_description: The final segment returns to the darker conditions following the lightning strike. The vessel continues moving forward through the rough seas, with the radar sweep rotating steadily and the navigation displays providing the only illumination in the otherwise dark, stormy environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates a dark, stormy sea that is momentarily illuminated by a flash of lightning. It begins with a steady view of the vessel's bow cutting through choppy night waters, guided by the glow of active radar and chart displays. As the ship maintains its course, a sudden lightning strike on the port side briefly floods the scene with light, revealing the violent state of the sea and the density of the storm clouds. The environment then shifts back into deep darkness, leaving the rotating radar sweep and navigation screens as the sole sources of illumination. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum through the rough waves as the storm persists around the vessel.
